items.name: Beef Empanada
items.description: Hand-folded Argentine-style empanada filled with savory seasoned beef, baked golden. A local favorite.

items.name: Chicken Empanada
items.description: Hand-folded Argentine-style empanada filled with tender seasoned chicken, baked golden.

items.name: Ham and Cheese Empanada
items.description: Flaky baked empanada filled with savory ham and melted cheese.

items.name: Croissant Royale
items.subtitle: Ham & Provolone
items.description: Flaky, buttery croissant filled with savory ham and melted provolone cheese, baked to golden perfection.

items.name: Croissant Bellissimo
items.subtitle: Brie & Prosciutto
items.description: Buttery croissant layered with creamy brie cheese, delicate prosciutto and sweet peach jam, finished with a touch of elegance in every bite.

items.name: Croissant Capri
items.subtitle: Caprese
items.description: Fresh mozzarella, ripe tomato, basil pesto and balsamic glaze on a golden croissant.

items.name: Croissant Sunrise
items.subtitle: Egg, Bacon & Cheese
items.description: Buttery croissant filled with fluffy scrambled eggs, crispy bacon and melted cheese for the perfect morning indulgence.

items.name: Plain Croissant
items.description: Simple, buttery and baked golden — lovely with any coffee.

items.name: Dulce de Leche Croissant
items.description: Drizzled with icing and almonds, filled with silky dulce de leche.

items.name: Panini Classico
items.subtitle: Ham, Cheese & Butter
items.description: Warm ciabatta bread pressed to perfection, filled with savory ham, creamy melted cheese and a touch of rich butter.

items.name: Panini Capri
items.subtitle: Caprese
items.description: Fresh mozzarella, ripe tomato slices, fragrant basil pesto and a drizzle of balsamic glaze pressed inside golden ciabatta bread.

items.name: Panini Toscana
items.subtitle: Honey Mustard Chicken
items.description: Grilled chicken breast, tangy honey mustard, melted provolone cheese and fresh mixed greens pressed in artisanal ciabatta bread.

items.name: Flatbread Caesar
items.subtitle: Grilled Chicken
items.description: Warm flatbread filled with tender grilled chicken breast, crisp lettuce, shaved parmesan and creamy Caesar dressing for a fresh, flavorful bite.

items.name: Avocado Elegance
items.description: Whole avocado, half smashed and half sliced, served on artisanal toast with boiled egg, fresh arugula, everything-bagel seeds and a drizzle of rich balsamic glaze.

items.name: Pizza Classica
items.subtitle: Cheese
items.description: Simple yet irresistible — crispy flatbread with velvety tomato sauce and a generous layer of melted mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Pizza Diavolo
items.subtitle: Pepperoni
items.description: Golden flatbread layered with rich tomato sauce, creamy mozzarella and spicy pepperoni slices for a bold, classic flavor.

items.name: Pizza Parma
items.subtitle: Prosciutto & Arugula
items.description: Crisp flatbread topped with fresh mozzarella, savory prosciutto, peppery arugula and a drizzle of rich balsamic glaze over tomato sauce.

items.name: Pizza Argentina
items.subtitle: Ham, Egg & Corn
items.description: A hearty flatbread with tomato sauce, melted mozzarella, tender ham, sliced boiled egg and sweet golden corn for a true South American touch.

items.name: Tutto Burguer
items.description: Our signature house burger with melted cheddar, crispy bacon, pickles and fresh greens on a toasted brioche bun, served with seasoned fries.

items.name: Cesar Royale
items.description: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed with grilled chicken, crispy bacon, shaved parmesan and crunchy croutons, finished with our signature Caesar dressing.

items.name: Mediterranean Bloom
items.description: A vibrant mix of fresh greens, strawberries, cherry tomatoes, feta, toasted almonds and balsamic glaze — light, bright and refreshing.

items.name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
items.description: A creamy blend of ripe strawberries and banana. Add a scoop of whey protein for +$1.25.

items.name: Wild Berries Smoothie
items.description: Blackberry, blueberry and mixed berries blended smooth and topped with cream. Add a scoop of whey protein for +$1.25.

items.name: Tropical Smoothie
items.description: Mango, pineapple and coconut blended into a creamy tropical escape.

items.name: Pina Colada Smoothie
items.description: Pineapple and coconut blended into a smooth, refreshing classic.

items.name: Starbucks Drinks
items.description: Proudly serving Starbucks — espresso, frappuccinos, refreshers, iced teas and seasonal favorites. Tap to view the full Starbucks menu.

items.name: Red Velvet Cake
items.description: Moist crimson sponge layered with smooth cream cheese frosting, offering a perfect balance of sweetness and a hint of cocoa.

items.name: Limoncello Cake
items.description: Light and airy lemon sponge cake infused with fresh limoncello, layered with silky cream and topped with candied lemon slices.

items.name: Chocolate Tuxedo Bombe
items.description: A show-stopping chocolate sphere with silky chocolate mousse, finished with elegant white chocolate drizzle.

items.name: Chocolate Mousse Cake
items.description: Layers of cookies-and-cream mousse over a chocolate base, topped with crunchy Oreo pieces for a delightful texture.

items.name: Lemon Berry Cream Mascarpone
items.description: Delicate layers of lemon and berry cream mascarpone with white chocolate curls — bright, creamy and elegant.

items.name: Carrot Cake
items.description: Moist layers of spiced carrot cake with a hint of walnuts, topped with creamy orange cream cheese frosting and candied carrot shavings.

items.name: Gluten-Free Chocolate Cake
items.description: Rich and indulgent chocolate cake made without gluten, featuring a moist texture and deep cocoa flavor, finished with a smooth chocolate frosting.

items.name: Red Mickey Mouse Macarons
items.description: Delicate almond meringue cookies shaped like iconic character faces, with a silky red raspberry ganache filling.

items.name: Green Dubai Mickey Mouse Macarons
items.description: Whimsical pistachio-flavored character macarons with a delicate pistachio cream center.

items.name: Oreo Mickey Mouse Macarons
items.description: Character-shaped macarons with a smooth cookies-and-cream filling for a playful, indulgent treat.

items.name: Argentine Alfajor – Chocolate
items.description: Traditional Argentine shortbread cookie filled with creamy dulce de leche and coated in rich chocolate.

items.name: Argentine Alfajor – White Chocolate
items.description: Classic Argentine shortbread cookie with smooth dulce de leche filling, enrobed in silky white chocolate.

items.name: Blueberry Muffin
items.description: Tender muffin bursting with plump blueberries, baked until golden with a perfect crumb.

items.name: Corn Muffin
items.description: Soft and fluffy golden muffin infused with sweet vanilla, offering a delicate aroma and classic flavor in every bite.

items.name: Chocolate Muffin
items.description: Rich and decadent muffin loaded with chocolate throughout, offering deep cocoa satisfaction.

items.name: Banana Nut Muffin
items.description: Classic muffin made with ripe bananas and toasted nuts for a warm, comforting flavor.

items.name: Forks, Cups or Plates
items.description: Extra serviceware for sharing back at your room or picnic table.
